title: ononis broteroana var. grandiflora
intro: Ononis broteroana var. grandiflora, also known as the large-flowered restharrow, is a plant species within the legume family (Fabaceae) that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The large-flowered restharrow is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Ononis broteroana var. grandiflora typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other topical applications.
